name: stockyard-llmtap
description: API analytics portal for LLM traffic. Latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99), error rates, cost breakdown by model, and volume tracking.

tools.name: llmtap_overview
tools.description: Get analytics overview: total requests, latency percentiles, error rate, cost.

tools.name: llmtap_latency
tools.description: Get detailed latency breakdown: p50, p95, p99 by model.

tools.name: llmtap_errors
tools.description: Get error breakdown by type, model, and time window.

tools.name: llmtap_costs
tools.description: Get cost analytics: spend per model, per endpoint, trends.

tools.name: llmtap_volume
tools.description: Get request volume over time for charting.

tools.name: llmtap_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the LLMTap proxy is running and healthy.
